name: conditional-get contract: stored validators live at the standards-last-fetch json path with etag last_modified and content_hash
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/conditional-get.sh" --source-id aws --simulate-status 200 --etag e1 --last-modified l1 --body-hash c1 && test -f .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch/aws.json && grep -q etag .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch/aws.json && grep -q last_modified .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch/aws.json && grep -q content_hash .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch/aws.json && echo path-ok 1>&2
